MINI MINUTES: Judge: Comm. Sue Kaplan Dept.: 218 Clerk: Anna Redigonda

Matter comes on calendar for Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference.
Lisa Padilla, Esq. appearing for Plaintiff, and is also representative for Plaintiff.
Limited Scope Attorney Denise Mingrone, appearing for Defendant Emily Wimmer, remaining defendant, who is present.

Matter assigned to Room 304B JTP Deborah Schwiezer for Settlement discussions.
Matter settles. Stipulation for entry of Judgment filed.
